title: June 2
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|June|hide31=yes}}

'''June 2''' is the 153rd day of the year (154th in leap years), with 212 days remaining.</noinclude>
*[[1950s#1953|1953]] – [[Rick Berry]] is born.
*[[1960s#1960|1960]] – [[Pip Torrens]] is born.
*[[1960s#1965|1965]] – [[Sean Stewart]] is born.
*[[1973]] – [[Kevin Feige]] is born.
*[[1997]] – [[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 20|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 20]] published.
*[[1999]] – ''[[Episode I: Obi-Wan Kenobi]]'' published.
*1999 – [[The Last Command (TPB)|''The Last Command'' trade paperback]] published.
*[[2004]] – [[Republic 65|''Republic'' 65]] published.
*2004 – "[[Handoff]]" made available on [[Hyperspace: The Official Star Wars Fan Club|Hyperspace]].
*[[2007]] – [[Dark Times 4|''Dark Times'' 4]] published
*[[2010]] – ''[[Star Wars Omnibus: A Long Time Ago.... Volume 1]]'' published.
*[[2011]] – ''[[Star Wars: The Clone Wars Comic UK 6.21]]'' published.
*2011 – [[Lee J. Ames]] dies.
*[[2020]] – ''[[Queen's Peril]]'' published.
*[[2021]] – [[War of the Bounty Hunters 1|''War of the Bounty Hunters'' 1]] published.
*[[2023]] – "[[Squadron / Forest Defenders]]" aired on [[Disney Junior]].
*[[2026]] – [[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace (novelization)|''Star Wars: The Phantom Menace'' (novel)]] to be reprinted.
*2026 – [[Star Wars: Episode II Attack of the Clones (novelization)|''Star Wars: Attack of the Clones'' (novel)]] to be reprinted.
*2026 – [[Star Wars: Revenge of the Sith (novelization)|''Star Wars: Revenge of the Sith'' (novel)]] to be reprinted.
*2026 – ''[[Star Wars: ABCs in a Galaxy Far, Far Away]]'' to be published.
<noinclude>
